rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §38.156, which governs concussion removal from interscholastic athletics. The provisions operate in entirely separate domains.
quote: A student shall be removed from an interscholastic athletics practice or competition immediately if one of the following persons believes the student might have sustained a concussion during the practice or competition:
_note: No conflict: proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption; rule concerns student concussion protocols in athletics.
